hooks.command: f=$(node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{const j=JSON.parse(d);process.stdout.write(j.tool_input.file_path)})" <&0); if echo "$f" | grep -qiE '\.(cs|ts|js|py|sql)$'; then result=$(sql-validate --schema C:/Users/jscott/downloads/sql-verifier/test-harness/schema/*.sql --src "$f" 2>&1); rc=$?; if [ $rc -eq 1 ]; then echo "$result"; echo "{\"systemMessage\":\"sql-validate found SQL schema errors in $(basename "$f"). Review the Action: lines in the output above and fix the invalid SQL references before proceeding.\"}"; fi; fi
